response.justification: Bogdan is technically well-qualified on the stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, AWS, Kubernetes, and recent LLM/AI integration work all align with the role's requirements and nice-to-haves. However, he is dramatically overqualified: a Staff/Senior engineer with 15+ years of experience applying for a junior/mid-level position raises serious questions about retention risk, salary alignment, and whether he would remain engaged with entry-level scope and on-site presence expectations. PostgreSQL is not explicitly listed in his skill set. A brief screening call to understand his motivation for targeting this seniority level would clarify whether the fit is realistic.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and Node.js proficiency demonstrated across multiple production environments at scale
AI/LLM and MCP integration work at re:cinq directly matches the role's nice-to-have qualifications
Proven AWS (CDK, services) and Kubernetes experience across several roles
concerns: Significantly overqualified — 15+ years at Staff/Senior level applying for a junior/mid-level role is a major retention and motivation risk
No explicit PostgreSQL experience listed; skills section references MongoDB, MySQL, and generic SQL
High on-site presence requirement is likely misaligned with a candidate at this seniority and experience level
